title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Aster DM Healthcare Capital India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Aster DM Healthcare Capital India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Radiologist with drive and ambition, Aster DM Healthcare Capital India in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Aster DM Healthcare Capital India:
Aster DM Healthcare Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare Capital India!
